method_summary: The AI Scientist-v2 uses a progressive agentic tree-search methodology managed by a dedicated experiment manager agent to autonomously generate scientific manuscripts, eliminating reliance on human-authored code templates and generalizing across diverse machine learning domains, with an enhanced AI reviewer component that integrates a Vision-Language Model feedback loop for iterative refinement of figures.
key_innovation: Novel progressive agentic tree-search methodology managed by a dedicated experiment manager agent that eliminates reliance on human-authored code templates and generalizes across diverse machine learning domains.
best_result: One fully AI-generated manuscript exceeded the average human acceptance threshold in a peer-reviewed ICLR workshop, marking the first instance of a fully AI-generated paper successfully navigating peer review.
title: The AI Scientist-v2: Workshop-Level Automated Scientific Discovery via Agentic Tree Search
